name: rollingsagas
description: RollingSagas auth and admin tools via the deployed auth MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Manage RollingSagas users, roles, bans, and sessions
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the RollingSagas auth worker MCP server for authenticated session inspection and user administration through the existing Better Auth and OAuth-backed MCP flow.
defaultPrompt: List RS users and inspect auth state
Create, ban, or change a user role in RS auth
Check my current RS auth session
